success.description: You trick your target into averting his attention just long enough for you to slip away. Disengage from the target and perform a free movement manoeuvre. If you end this movement engaged to something that provides sufficient cover, you may hide. Your target may make an Observation check with a difficulty equal to your ranks in Stealth to detect your location
As above, but you can perform 2 movement manoeuvres for free

boon.description: The target gains the Staggered condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: Suffer 1 fatigue for each movement manoeuvre you perform this turn

chaosStar.description: Add to your next action during this encounter
